title: Failure Classification, Retry Budgets, Backoff, and Load Shedding · Diagnostic Repair Bay
summary: An incident engineer receives a plausible but defective failure taxonomy and bounded retry policy; preserve message identity and timing, locate the first broken ownership boundary, and retain a deterministic regression case. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in failure taxonomy and bounded retry policy and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defens…
objectives: Classify malformed, unauthorized, missing dependency, rate limit, timeout, conflict, transient, permanent, and ambiguous effect failures by evidence.
Bound attempts, total age, delay, processing deadline, queue residence, and operator escalation as one retry budget.
Apply exponential backoff and jitter without blocking consumer slots or requeueing hot loops and preserve intended availability time.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Inspect the failure record · Debug Transient Permanent Ambiguous
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug messaging team handles case 5924 in a multi-tenant case event backbone with three subscriber responsibilities. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to classify permanent and ambiguous outcomes before applying both attempt and age budgets; allow exactly one terminal acknowledgement decision owner; then make the broker confirmation disappear after the message may have committed. Browser code models pure messaging decisions only. amqplib, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, external effects, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Classify malformed, unauthorized, missing dependency, rate limit, timeout, conflict, transient, permanent, and ambiguous effect failures by evidence.

Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to classify permanent and ambiguous outcomes before applying both attempt and age budgets; allow exactly one terminal acknowledgement decision owner; then lose a quorum member and recompute majority availability. Browser code models pure messaging decisions only. amqplib, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, external effects, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Record original identity, attempt, reason, first and next time, owner, budget, terminal disposition, and causal metrics without high-cardinality leaks.

For RabbitMQ and TypeScript Publish the incident record · Debug Retry Observability Ownership, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: Queue depth alone explains whether retries are healthy.
